introSection: Supersonic Train is a steel sit down roller coaster from German firm Mack Rides currently under construction at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France. The ride is expected to open in 2027.
fullText: Supersonic Train is a steel sit down roller coaster from German firm Mack Rides currently under construction at Nigloland in Dolancourt, Grand Est, France. The ride is expected to open in 2027.
